title: For foreign user, How to get a lihkg account

replies.msg:
Welcome to Lihkg

Here is a simple guide for u to get an account.

We are sorry that the owner of the site are not able to provide a English interface at the moment.

First click on the menu icon on the website



Then click on login/register



register now



key in the info as follows

lihkg only accept email with .edu domain





Soon after, u will have a confirmation email for verification, just click on the link in the email, then u shd have ur account ready.


Hope it helps, if u have done it feel free to reply down here
please also utilize the google translate plug-in to auto translate content
I think with the new user coming in, we will have more content in English for them, especially the news
Thank you very much for posting this!
Get a account & Stand with HK!

quote.msg: Stand with Hong Kong

replies.msg:
With new foreign user, we shall not only focus on 'stand with is', we shd show them how they could really help

There are posts in Chinese listed out how to help us but no English version are ready

quote.msg:
Welcome to Lihkg

Here is a simple guide for u to get an account.

We are sorry that the owner of the site are not able to provide a English interface at the moment.

First click on the menu icon on the website



Then click on login/register



register now



key in the info as follows

lihkg only accept email with .edu domain





Soon after, u will have a confirmation email for verification, just click on the link in the email, then u shd have ur account ready.


Hope it helps, if u have done it feel free to reply down here

replies.msg: It’s actually possible to use a non-.edu domain. I registered with my university email and it’s not a .edu (only US universities have .edu domains; I’m from Canada so my university is a .ca). It’s just that you don’t know which universities are accepted and which aren’t.

replies.msg:
全民抗爭，十月一前每日堅持做以下嘅動作。係堅持，堅唔到都要堅持，請發誓你可以堅持成個九月：

1. 永遠抵制任何福建幫以及元朗鄉黑嘅商鋪、藍紅食店、cctvb廣告、黨鐵商埸。仲有記得逢星期五同日都罷買！好重要！記得搭黨鐵都要跳閘！好重要！

2. 低娛樂（閒時要做運動發洩、晚晚十點窗邊鳩叫、拒絕淘寶！）
3. 每日簽最少1個聯署（實搵到）
4. 全民打多條國際文宣戰線 (Twitter, Reddit)
5. 每星期最少參與1次行動，無行動去商場涼冷氣，理性咁教育自由行。
6. 每星期去連儂貼3張文宣
7. 出糧提款換美金
8. 唔好買入任何大陸公司股票
9. 轉埋你個MPF去外地基金
10. 不要說推，試著將呢整個訊息copy and paste嚟推post#kill
11. Tag或催你身邊三個人一齊參與
歡迎幫手整合同加事件。加油，相信我哋日日都做到。只有200萬人堅持經濟抗爭先可以制裁佢地。

利申：我做緊。你呢？

common wording used in LIHKG

巴打
Pronunciation : Ba Da
Meaning : brother (older and younger)

絲打
Pronunciation : Si Da
Meaning : Sister ( older and younger )

屌你
Pronunciation : Diu Nei
Meaning : Fuck you
